---
title: "groove_analysis"
author: "Janek Z"
format: dashboard
theme: quartz
editor: visual
---

# Welcome

## Project

### About the Repository

::: {.card title="About this project"}
this is the transformed README file:

This repository was created for the course **Computational Musicology** at the University of Amsterdam.\
It contains an analysis of a selected corpus of music from my playlist *"I Don't Want This Groove to Ever End"*.
:::

### Introduction

::: {.card title="Introduction"}
In this analysis I analyze a playlist I created called "I Don't Want This Groove to Ever End", named after the first track on it.
:::

### The Playlist

::: {.card title="The Playlist"}
The playlist is a collection of what I call groovy songs: tracks that are heavily based on a looped or recurring musical phrase or rhythmic pattern.
:::

# The Analysis

### Overview

::: {.card title="Overview"}
Here the analysis of the playlist will be shown.
:::

### Example Code

::: {.card title="Example Code"}
```{r}
1 + 1
```
:::

## Musical Analysis

### Track Example

::: {.card title="Key and Chord Analysis"}
```{include=analysis_of_keys.rmd}
```
:::
